steps.title: Identify the rhetorical constraint
steps.content: The audience already knows what leporellos are, so the response should describe this work, not re-explain the form.

steps.title: Apply the constraint to the choices
steps.content: B describes the work's specific features—panoramic landscape, ink, and watercolor—without re-explaining the form. A, C, and D all re-explain what leporellos are to an audience that already knows, contradicting the goal. That matches choice B — B is correct.
